_comment: Single source of truth for the Framework's domain. Change `tld` and re-run scripts/render-framework.mjs to regenerate every edge vhost, DNS record, and cert SAN. This is what makes the Framework domain-portable + SaaS-able (one config per tenant). Plan 0004.

portainer.note: ops — mesh only, no public DNS

tiers.mtls: public DNS + nginx requires a family client cert (ssl_verify_client on)
tiers.public: public DNS + open (no client cert) — marketing/known-public surfaces
tiers.wireguard: NO public DNS, NO public vhost — reachable only over the WireGuard mesh
